Off Calendar Sep-11-2012 Advanced From Jan-08-13 To Sep-12-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-28-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Emilie Calhoun for Francene Kennedy. Seth Skootksy for Stanley Kelley.

Ms. Calhoun stated that they attempted to find a neutral fiduciary, that they were unable to do so, that Francene is the only candidate, explained urgency due to the foreclosure sale and the steps/actions taken by her Client with respect to the loans/notes. In addition, Ms. Calhoun stated that Anthony filed bankruptcy and that they can not do 13100 declarations because they believe the loan amounts exceed the 13100 requirement. Mr. Skootksy raised the issue of conflict of interest with Francene being appointed as Administrator and spoke of other options (offset) with respect to the loans. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-14-2012 Continued To Dec-18-12 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Emilie Calhoun for Francene Kelly Kennedy (Petitioner). Seth Skootsky for Stanley Kelley (Objector). Anne Draper for Anthony Kelly.

Ms. Draper reported the outcome of the hearing in Dept. 501 this morning and that the Preliminary Injunction was denied and the foreclosure sale will not take place until 7 days. She is confident that the foreclosure is not going to take place. The Court indicated its thinking is to get all matters to trial, open probate for Ben but not appointing Francene. It is best to have an independent administrator. Ms. Calhoun and Ms. Draper presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the need for appointment of a Special Administrator to communicate with the foreclosure trustee. The Petition for Probate of Will was continued to December 18, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court will entertain appointment of an independant adminstrator if there is a nomination.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Harris.

MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case numbers PTR-11-295040 The Exemption Trust and PTR-10-293378 The Juanita B. Kelley Survivor's Trust.

Appearances: Emilie Calhoun for Francene Kelley Kennedy (Beneficiary and Trustee of the Exemption Trust). Andrew Schultz for Rena Harel (Trustee of the Survivor Trust and the Exemption Trust). Seth Skootksy for and with Anthony Kelley and for Stanley Kelley and Reginald Kelley.

Ms. Calhoun and Mr. Skootsky presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the Creditor's Claim. The Petition for Order Authorizing and Directing Successor Trustee to Pay Bryant Mortuary's Creditor Claim was continued to October 17, 2012 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Calhoun to file her objections by September 26, 2012. Mr. Skootsky is to file his reply by October 15, 2012. Status on probate (case#295479) was continued to June 18, 2013 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Ex Parte Petition to Extend Powers of Temporary Trustee and to Authorize Rena Harel to Execute 13100 Declaration, etc. was denied. Status on the Attorney's fees in the Exemption Trust and the Survivor's Trust were also continued to June 18, 2013 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 and remaining aspects of the Petition for Breach of Trust was also continued to June 18, 2013 as a control date on any remaining issues.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Court Reporter: Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Hearing On Ex Parte Petition To Advance Hearing Date
Off Calendar Aug-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PTR-11-295040 The Exemption Trust and case number PTR-10-293378 The Juanita B. Kelley Survivor's Trust.

Appearances: Emilie Calhoun for Francene Kennedy. Seth Skootsky for and with Anthony Kelley and for Stanley Kelley and Reginald Kelley. Lawrence Siracusa for Rena Harel (Trustee). Nelson Wild Guardian Ad Litem for Kelly Ann Kelley.

Discussions were held with regard to the loans going into the Estate (who holds interest in the loans/the Trusts or the Estate), appointment of a Special Administrator for Ben's Estate for the purpose of collecting payments on the loans, the Creditor's Claim for funeral expenses, the 4th Amendment, advancing the hearing date on Ben's Estate, the surcharge isssue, etc. The Court once again expressed concern about the Attorney's fees, stated that the Parties will need to litigate all matters and that all matters will go before one Judge. All matters were continued to September 12, 2012 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Off Calendar Jul-03-2012 Continued To Jan-08-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Called with case number PES-12-295030 Estate of Juanita Kelly.

Appearance: Seth Skootsky for Stanley Kelly. Emilie Calhoun for Francene Kelly Kennedy. Lawrence Siracusa for Rena Harel. Anthony Kelly and his wife were present.

The Court and all counsel have discussion prior to calling the case. The Court asked the parties to get a tolling agreement and that to consider the loans as part of the trust and have it consider in the trust.

At the callling of the calendar, all parties returned to court with an agreement to a tolling agreement with one note at issue with Stanley Kelly and his wife in the Exemption Trust. Other notes can remain status quo. Status of tolling agreement is set on July 17, 2012 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 in case number PTR-11-295040, the Exemption Trust . Petition for Probate of Will in case number PES-12-295479 and Petition for Letter of Administration in case number PES-12-295030 are continued to January 8, 2013 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Demurrer in civil action is set without prejudice to re-calendaring on an earlier date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Lelu.
